summary: The capsule captures all five ground-truth facts and the full causal chain but misassigns roles: the expired-certificate error (line 83) is tagged 'trigger' rather than 'root_cause', while late circuit-breaker-open errors are promoted to 'root_cause', and the S3 presign distractor is correctly kept out of evidence.
improvements: Relabel line 83 ('tls: certificate has expired') as root_cause and demote the circuit-breaker-open lines to consequence — the cert expiry is the actual root cause, not the CB state
Include at least one 500/503 order HTTP response line (e.g. line 85/91/96) as a consequence to make the customer-visible impact explicit
